---
title: "Notes"
subtitle: Under construction
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false

format:
  html:
    pagetitle: "Tiffany Le | Notes"
---

A place to store some of the notes I have taken for my own use and cleaned up (and/or expanded on), whether it was from class or otherwise. There may also be some resources and other references linked in various pages. 

I cannot guarantee the correctness of any of these, so, if you see something is amiss, please feel free to [report it on GitHub](https://github.com/tiffanynle/tiffanynle.github.io/issues/new).
